semanticContract.trigger: Java source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware Java navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external jdtls process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: Kotlin source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware Kotlin navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external kotlin-lsp process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: C# source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware C# navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external csharp-ls process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: C or C++ source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware C and C++ navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
inputs: C or C++ workspace and source files
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external clangd process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: Go source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware Go navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external gopls process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: Python source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware Python navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external pyright-langserver process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: TypeScript or JavaScript source navigation or diagnostics are requested.
semanticContract.intent: Provide language-aware TypeScript and JavaScript navigation, symbols, references, and diagnostics.
inputs: TypeScript or JavaScript workspace and source files
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: starts the external typescript-language-server process for language intelligence. Approval posture: exact preview is required for plugin installation; readiness requires both agent plugin configuration and the language-server executable.

semanticContract.trigger: The operator explicitly starts or manages a durable goal.
semanticContract.intent: Track a concrete objective until it is achieved or genuinely blocked.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: none by default; underlying work keeps its original authority boundary. Approval posture: activate only for explicit goal-tracking intent, never infer a goal, and never mark incomplete work complete.

semanticContract.trigger: The operator requests a sourced, multi-step research answer.
semanticContract.intent: Gather authoritative evidence and synthesize a traceable answer.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: read-only network and workspace research. Approval posture: private-source access and every external write require explicit authority; distinguish source facts from inference.

semanticContract.trigger: The operator asks for grounded options or improvement ideas.
semanticContract.intent: Generate and compare project-relevant directions before selection.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: none. Approval posture: the user selects a direction before implementation or external mutation; keep hypotheses labeled and grounded.

semanticContract.trigger: A product or implementation idea needs requirements framing.
semanticContract.intent: Turn an ambiguous idea into a bounded product contract.
inputs: Idea, users, constraints, and known decisions
outputs: Requirements, flows, acceptance examples, and scope boundaries
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: read-only discovery. Approval posture: requirements remain proposals until user acceptance and persistence requires approval; do not convert undecided choices into facts.

semanticContract.trigger: An accepted product contract needs implementation planning.
semanticContract.intent: Produce dependency-ordered implementation units and verification evidence.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: read-only repository and document inspection. Approval posture: writing or publishing the plan and changing product scope require explicit approval.

semanticContract.trigger: A change set requires correctness and regression review.
semanticContract.intent: Report actionable bugs, regressions, and missing safety coverage.
inputs: Diff, repository context, and relevant plan
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: reads GitHub pull-request data and may post one review comment when the operator explicitly invokes review for that pull request. Approval posture: invocation must identify the review target; fixes and all other remote writes require separate authority.

semanticContract.trigger: A requirements or planning document needs structured review.
semanticContract.intent: Identify concrete blockers, contradictions, and missing decisions.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: none. Approval posture: applying findings or posting comments requires separate exact authorization; preserve accepted scope and report only material findings.

semanticContract.trigger: The operator asks to create or update an agent skill.
semanticContract.intent: Create a focused, reusable skill with clear triggers and workflow.
inputs: Skill purpose, constraints, and target runtime
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: may create skill files, execute declared Python evaluation helpers, invoke Claude, and open a local report when explicitly requested. Approval posture: file writes and evaluations require the user's skill-creation intent; never embed credentials or undeclared executables.

semanticContract.trigger: A bounded autonomous iteration loop is explicitly requested.
semanticContract.intent: Repeat implementation and verification until a declared condition is met.
inputs: Objective, stop conditions, and verification command
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: writes and removes .claude/ralph-loop.local.md and installs a Stop hook that continues the current session loop. Approval posture: explicit loop invocation must provide stop conditions; iterations never broaden mutation authority.

semanticContract.trigger: A change needs security-specific implementation or review guidance.
semanticContract.intent: Identify concrete security boundaries, threats, and mitigations.
semanticContract.safety: Side effects: read-only inspection with no automatic hooks, dependency installation, or model-endpoint upload. Approval posture: scanners, code execution, remote access, file changes, and publication require explicit authorization.
